expectations.text: Colors defined as CSS custom properties
Alert backgrounds exist and are not fully saturated (uses tinted/light backgrounds)
expectations.evidence: PASS: tinted_backgrounds_for_alerts — agent used --primary-light: #EEF2FF, --success-light: #ECFDF5, --danger-light: #FEF2F2 as tinted alert backgrounds (light, readable, appropriately desaturated)
